race.comment: MAWJOOD (6) capable type who will appreciate the sting out of the ground fourth-up. Sat on the fast tempo and never surrendered with a game third over 1200m at Gosford. Extra trip in his favour and can get cover from the gate. Go close. INVADER ZIM (17) frustrating gelding who gave the impression he was in for a good prep when he closed quickly for a narrow third over 1300m at Warwick Farm first-up. Both wins have come second-up and will enjoy the going. Don't dismiss. WINSTON HILLS (14) ready for the 1400m now after two runs back and he gets an economical run today from the low gate. Can race closer and not without each way prospects. KING TUT (12) comes up from Victoria after going quickly through the grades this time in. Finally drawn a decent barrier and can take a hand in the finish. FRONTEX (16) resumes with a good fresh record and don't let him get under the guard after the two sound trials. Has the ability to test this field.
